title: Change the Item Font, Size, Colour and apply Bold, Underline, Italic
excerpt:
Change the font, size, colour and apply bold, underline, or italic of an item.

posts.author: Laura00 (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Change the font, size, colour and apply bold, underline, or italic of an item.

It would be helpful to improve the aesthetic and visibility of the boards.At the moment some of these options are available only in the update section of an item.

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could be good also to:

  • be able to change the header of the column (Change background colour, and font, size…). Why not being able to change the backgound of a whole column or set a whole column in bold. It will be very useful when you have a board with a lot of columns.
  • being able to change font, size, colour, underline… within a text cell.
